identifier.description: Chemical identifier — compound name (e.g. "ibuprofen"), CAS number (e.g. "15687-27-1"), or SMILES string. Returns molecular formula and weight

tools.name: science.chem.names
tools.description: Get all known names, synonyms, CAS numbers, and registry IDs for a chemical compound. Input any identifier (name, CAS, SMILES, InChIKey) and get the full list of aliases. Useful for finding alternative names, trade names, and cross-references (NCI CACTUS)

identifier.description: Chemical identifier to look up synonyms for — compound name, CAS number, SMILES, or InChIKey (e.g. "aspirin", "50-78-2")

limit.description: Maximum number of names/synonyms to return (1-100). Default: 20

tools.name: vehicle.safety.recalls
tools.description: Search NHTSA vehicle recalls by make, model, and year. Returns campaign number, manufacturer, subject, summary, consequence, remedy, affected components, and units affected. Covers all US recalls from 1966 to present. Essential for automotive safety, insurance, and fleet management agents (NHTSA)

model_year.description: Model year (e.g. 2023). NHTSA recall data available from 1966 to present

tools.name: vehicle.safety.complaints
tools.description: Search consumer complaints filed with NHTSA about vehicles. Returns incident details including crash/fire flags, injuries, deaths, affected components, and complaint summary. Covers US vehicles from ~1995 to present. Critical for safety research and product liability analysis (NHTSA)

model_year.description: Model year (e.g. 2023). NHTSA complaint data available from ~1995 to present

tools.name: vehicle.safety.ratings
tools.description: Get NCAP 5-Star crash test safety ratings by make/model/year or vehicle ID. Returns overall rating, frontal crash, side crash, and rollover ratings (1-5 stars). Also shows related complaints, recalls, and investigation counts. Available from ~2011 for US-market vehicles (NHTSA)

make.description: Vehicle manufacturer name (e.g. "Toyota", "Honda"). Required unless vehicle_id is provided

model.description: Vehicle model name (e.g. "Camry", "Civic"). Required unless vehicle_id is provided

model_year.description: Model year (e.g. 2023). 5-Star ratings available from ~2011. Required unless vehicle_id is provided

vehicle_id.description: NHTSA Vehicle ID for full ratings detail (get from initial search). Overrides make/model/year if provided

tools.name: vehicle.safety.investigations
tools.description: Search NHTSA defect investigation records by manufacturer and model. Returns investigation number, type (preliminary/engineering analysis), description, latest activity date, and NHTSA action number. Covers active and closed investigations for US vehicles (NHTSA)

model.description: Vehicle model name to narrow results (e.g. "Model 3", "Bolt EV")

tools.name: science.pdb.search
tools.description: Search 220K+ macromolecular 3D structures in the Protein Data Bank by keyword, protein name, organism, or author. Returns PDB IDs with relevance scores. The canonical database for structural biology, X-ray crystallography, cryo-EM, and NMR structures (RCSB PDB)

query.description: Search query — keyword, protein name, organism, or author (e.g. "insulin", "hemoglobin", "Homo sapiens", "Watson")

tools.name: science.pdb.structure
tools.description: Get full details for a 3D protein structure by PDB ID — title, experimental method (X-ray/cryo-EM/NMR), resolution, molecular weight, chain counts (protein/DNA/RNA), deposit date, primary citation with DOI and PubMed ID. Essential for drug design and structural analysis (RCSB PDB)

pdb_id.description: 4-character PDB identifier (e.g. "4HHB" for hemoglobin, "1BNA" for DNA, "6LU7" for SARS-CoV-2 main protease)

tools.name: science.pdb.ligand
tools.description: Get chemical component data for a ligand/small molecule by its 3-letter PDB code — name, molecular formula, weight, type, formal charge, heavy atom count, SMILES/InChI descriptors. Covers ATP, HEM, NAG, drug molecules, cofactors, ions, and 40K+ chemical entities in the PDB (RCSB PDB)

ligand_id.description: Chemical component identifier — standard 3-letter code (e.g. "ATP" for adenosine triphosphate, "HEM" for heme, "NAG" for N-acetylglucosamine, "ZN" for zinc ion)

tools.name: science.pdb.sequence
tools.description: Search protein structures by amino acid sequence similarity (BLAST). Input a protein sequence and find all PDB structures with matching chains. Configure identity cutoff (e.g. 90%) and E-value threshold. Returns PDB entity IDs ranked by similarity score. Essential for homology modeling and structure prediction (RCSB PDB)

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence in one-letter code (e.g. "MVLSPADKTNVKAAWGKVGAHAGEYGAEALERMFLSFPTTKTYFPHFDLSH" — first 50 residues of human hemoglobin alpha)

evalue_cutoff.description: Maximum E-value threshold for BLAST significance. Default: 0.1

tools.name: jobs.adzuna.search
tools.description: Search job listings across 16+ countries (US, UK, AU, CA, DE, FR, and more) by keyword, location, category, salary range. Returns job title, company, salary, location, and apply URL. 70K+ developer jobs in US alone (Adzuna)

country.description: Country code: us, gb, au, ca, de, fr, nl, in, br, pl, nz, za, sg, at, ch, it, ru (default us)

category.description: Job category tag (e.g. "it-jobs", "sales-jobs", "engineering-jobs"). Get tags from adzuna.categories

tools.name: jobs.adzuna.categories
tools.description: List all job categories available in a country — IT, Sales, Engineering, HR, Healthcare, Hospitality, and more. Use category tags to filter adzuna.search results (Adzuna)

tools.name: jobs.adzuna.salary
tools.description: Get salary distribution for a job title — returns histogram of salary buckets with job counts. Example: "python developer" in US → $20K-$140K distribution. Use for salary benchmarking and market research (Adzuna)

what.description: Job title or keywords for salary histogram (e.g. "python developer", "data scientist")

tools.name: sports.bdl.games
tools.description: Get NBA and NFL game results by date — scores, teams, status (Final/In Progress/Scheduled). Filter by date, season, or team. Covers all NBA and NFL games with real-time scores (BallDontLie)

date.description: Game date (YYYY-MM-DD, e.g. "2026-03-29"). Returns all games on that date

team_id.description: Filter by team ID (get IDs from bdl.teams)

tools.name: sports.bdl.teams
tools.description: List NBA and NFL teams with conference, division, city, and abbreviation. Filter by conference (East/West for NBA, AFC/NFC for NFL) or division (BallDontLie)

conference.description: Filter by conference (e.g. "East", "West" for NBA; "AFC", "NFC" for NFL)

tools.name: sports.bdl.players
tools.description: Search NBA players by name — returns position, jersey number, and current team. Example: "lebron" → LeBron James #23 F, Los Angeles Lakers (BallDontLie)

tools.name: address.postal.lookup
tools.description: Look up a postal/ZIP code in 60+ countries — returns city name, state/region, and lat/lon coordinates. Supports US, UK, Germany, France, Japan, Brazil, India, Australia, and 50+ more countries. Provide country code (ISO 2-letter) + postal code (Zippopotam.us)

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. "us", "de", "gb", "fr", "jp", "br", "in", "au"). Supports 60+ countries

postal_code.description: Postal/ZIP code (e.g. "90210" for US, "10115" for Germany, "SW1A" for UK, "75001" for France)

tools.name: logistics.dhl.track
tools.description: Track a DHL shipment by tracking number — returns current status, delivery events timeline, origin/destination, estimated delivery date, and service type. Supports all DHL services: Express, Parcel, eCommerce, Freight. Official DHL data for 220+ countries (DHL)

tracking_number.description: DHL tracking number (e.g. "00340434292135100186" for DHL Paket, "1234567890" for DHL Express). Supports all DHL services: Express, Parcel, eCommerce, Freight

tools.name: address.ukpost.lookup
tools.description: Look up a UK postcode — returns district, region, country, ward, parish, parliamentary constituency, and lat/lon coordinates. Backed by ONS/Ordnance Survey data. Example: "SW1A 1AA" → Westminster, London (Postcodes.io)

postcode.description: UK postcode to look up (e.g. "SW1A 1AA" for Westminster, "EC2R 8AH" for City of London, "M1 1AA" for Manchester). Returns district, region, country, lat/lon, parliamentary constituency

tools.name: address.ukpost.nearest
tools.description: Find nearest UK postcodes to a lat/lon coordinate — returns postcodes sorted by distance with district info. Use for reverse geocoding in the UK (Postcodes.io)

tools.name: address.ukpost.validate
tools.description: Check if a UK postcode is valid and exists — returns true/false. Use for form validation or data cleaning (Postcodes.io)

postcode.description: UK postcode to validate (e.g. "SW1A 1AA"). Returns true if valid format and exists

tools.name: logistics.shipengine.rates
tools.description: Compare shipping rates across multiple carriers (USPS, UPS, FedEx, DHL) for a package. Provide origin/destination ZIP codes, weight in pounds, and optional dimensions. Returns sorted rates with price, delivery time, and service type. Up to 84% off retail rates (ShipEngine)

from_zip.description: Origin US ZIP code (e.g. "10001" for NYC)

to_zip.description: Destination US ZIP code (e.g. "90210" for Beverly Hills)

tools.name: logistics.shipengine.validate
tools.description: Validate and standardize a US address — returns USPS-verified address with corrected spelling, ZIP+4, and validation status. Catches typos, missing info, and invalid addresses before shipping (ShipEngine)

tools.name: logistics.shipengine.carriers
tools.description: List all connected shipping carriers with their IDs and codes. Shows which carriers are available for rate comparison (USPS, UPS, FedEx, DHL, etc.) (ShipEngine)

filter.description: Optional filter on carrier name (e.g. "ups", "usps"). Returns all connected carriers if omitted

tools.name: weather.weatherapi.current
tools.description: Get current weather conditions for any location worldwide — temperature, wind, humidity, pressure, UV index, cloud cover, feels-like temp. Accepts city name, coordinates, zip code, or airport code. 100K+ stations globally (WeatherAPI.com)

q.description: Location query — city name (e.g. "London"), coordinates ("48.8,2.35"), US zip ("10001"), UK postcode ("SW1"), IP address, or IATA airport code ("JFK")

tools.name: weather.weatherapi.forecast
tools.description: Get 3-day weather forecast — daily min/max temperature, conditions, wind, precipitation, humidity, rain/snow chance, UV index. Accepts any location query (WeatherAPI.com)

q.description: Location query — city name, coordinates, zip code, or airport code

tools.name: weather.weatherapi.astronomy
tools.description: Get sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset times and moon phase for any location and date. Returns moon illumination percentage and phase name (WeatherAPI.com)

q.description: Location query — city name, coordinates, or zip code

date.description: Date for astronomy data (YYYY-MM-DD, default today)

tools.name: weather.weatherapi.search
tools.description: Search and autocomplete location names — returns matching cities with coordinates. Type partial name (e.g. "lon" → London, "mos" → Moscow). Use result coordinates with other weather tools (WeatherAPI.com)

q.description: Search query — partial city name for autocomplete (e.g. "lon" → London, "mos" → Moscow)

tools.name: dev.code.execute
tools.description: Execute source code in a sandboxed environment — 71 programming languages supported (Python, JavaScript, Java, C++, Go, Rust, C#, Bash, Ruby, PHP, and 60+ more). Returns stdout, stderr, execution time, and memory usage. Safe sandboxed execution with CPU/memory limits. Use code.languages to get language IDs (Judge0 CE)

language_id.description: Language ID from code.languages (e.g. 71=Python 3, 63=JavaScript, 62=Java, 54=C++, 60=Go, 73=Rust, 51=C#, 46=Bash). Call code.languages for full list

stdin.description: Standard input to feed to the program

cpu_time_limit.description: CPU time limit in seconds (default 5, max 15)

tools.name: dev.code.languages
tools.description: List all 71 available programming languages and their IDs for code execution. Common IDs: 71=Python 3.8, 63=JavaScript (Node.js), 62=Java, 54=C++ (GCC), 60=Go, 73=Rust, 51=C#, 46=Bash. Returns full list with compiler/interpreter versions (Judge0 CE)

filter.description: Optional filter — substring match on language name (e.g. "python", "java", "rust"). Returns all 71 languages if omitted

tools.name: web.scrape.extract
tools.description: Extract raw HTML from any URL — cheapest web scraping API ($0.00013 for simple sites). Returns decoded HTML content, HTTP status code, and content length. Use for data extraction, content analysis, or price monitoring. Handles anti-bot protection automatically (Zyte)

url.description: URL to scrape — returns raw HTML content. Fast and cheap ($0.00013 for simple sites). Example: "https://example.com"

tools.name: web.scrape.browser
tools.description: Render a URL with headless browser and return JS-rendered HTML. Use for SPAs, React/Vue apps, or pages with dynamic content that raw HTTP cannot capture. Returns fully rendered DOM as HTML text (Zyte)

url.description: URL to render with headless browser — returns JS-rendered HTML. Use for SPAs, dynamic content. More expensive than extract. Example: "https://example.com"

tools.name: web.scrape.screenshot
tools.description: Capture a full-page screenshot of any URL — returns base64-encoded PNG image. Use for visual verification, monitoring, or archiving. Headless browser renders the page before capture (Zyte)

url.description: URL to screenshot — returns base64-encoded PNG image. Use for visual verification or page capture. Example: "https://example.com"

tools.name: vehicle.carmarket.search
tools.description: Search millions of active US car listings by make, model, year, price range, mileage, ZIP code, and radius. Returns VIN, price, miles, dealer info, Carfax status, and days on market. Filter by seller type (dealer/private) and color. Data from all major US marketplaces (MarketCheck)

zip.description: US ZIP code to search near (e.g. "10001")

radius.description: Search radius in miles from ZIP (max 100 on free tier)

tools.name: vehicle.carmarket.listing
tools.description: Get full details for a specific car listing by ID — VIN, price, MSRP, mileage, full build specs (engine, transmission, drivetrain, fuel type), dealer contact, Carfax 1-owner status, days on market, photos. Get listing IDs from carmarket.search (MarketCheck)

id.description: MarketCheck listing ID (e.g. "3TMCZ5AN5PM564843-883937ce-f335"). Get IDs from carmarket.search results

tools.name: security.threatintel.reputation
tools.description: Get domain reputation score (0-100) with detailed security test results — WHOIS age, SSL validity, mail server config, blacklist status, and more. Higher score = safer domain. Essential for security agents evaluating domain trustworthiness (Threat Intelligence Platform)

domain.description: Domain name to check reputation (e.g. "google.com", "suspicious-site.xyz"). Returns reputation score 0-100 and security test results

tools.name: security.threatintel.malware
tools.description: Check if a domain is associated with malware, phishing, or other threats. Returns safe score (0-100) and detailed warning descriptions. Use for URL safety verification before agent navigation (Threat Intelligence Platform)

domain.description: Domain name to check for malware and phishing (e.g. "example.com"). Returns safe score 0-100 and warning details

tools.name: security.threatintel.infrastructure
tools.description: Analyze domain infrastructure — all associated IPv4 addresses, geolocation (country, city, region), subnets, and resource types (web, mail, DNS). Reveals hosting setup, CDN usage, and geographic distribution (Threat Intelligence Platform)

domain.description: Domain name to analyze infrastructure (e.g. "google.com"). Returns all associated IPs, geolocation, subnets, and resource types

tools.name: podcasts.listennotes.search
tools.description: Full-text search across 3.7M+ podcasts and 186M+ episodes. Search by keyword, filter by language and genre, sort by relevance or date. Returns episode titles, podcast names, audio URLs, and duration. The most comprehensive podcast search API available (Listen Notes)

q.description: Search query — full-text search across 186M+ podcast episodes and 3.7M+ podcasts (e.g. "artificial intelligence", "startup funding", "true crime")

type.description: Search type: "episode" (default) searches episode titles/descriptions, "podcast" searches podcast-level metadata

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. "en", "es", "fr"). Filters results by podcast language

genre_ids.description: Comma-separated genre IDs to filter (e.g. "93,127" for Business+Technology). See Listen Notes genre list

sort_by_date.description: Sort by date (true) or relevance (false, default)

tools.name: podcasts.listennotes.podcast
tools.description: Get full details for a podcast by Listen Notes ID — title, publisher, description, episode count, language, country, website, genres, and latest publish date. Use IDs from listennotes.search or listennotes.best (Listen Notes)

id.description: Listen Notes podcast ID (e.g. "4d3fe717742d4963a85562e9f84d8c79"). Get IDs from listennotes.search or listennotes.best

tools.name: podcasts.listennotes.best
tools.description: Get curated lists of the best podcasts by genre — Technology (127), Business (93), TV & Film (68), Sports (77), Leisure (82), and 60+ more genres. Paginated, returns podcast titles, publishers, episode counts, and descriptions (Listen Notes)

genre_id.description: Genre ID to filter (e.g. 93=Business, 127=Technology, 68=TV & Film, 82=Leisure, 77=Sports). Omit for overall best

tools.name: music.audd.recognize
tools.description: Identify a song from an audio file URL — like Shazam for AI agents. Analyzes audio fingerprint against 80M+ tracks and returns artist, title, album, release date, plus Spotify and Apple Music links. Accepts MP3, WAV, OGG, or any audio URL (AudD)

url.description: URL of audio file to identify (MP3, WAV, OGG, etc.). The API analyzes the audio and matches it against 80M+ tracks. Example: "https://example.com/song.mp3"

tools.name: music.audd.lyrics
tools.description: Search for song lyrics by artist name, song title, or both. Returns full lyrics text, artist, title, and metadata. Query examples: "imagine john lennon", "bohemian rhapsody", "taylor swift love story" (AudD)

q.description: Search query for lyrics — artist name, song title, or both (e.g. "imagine john lennon", "bohemian rhapsody", "taylor swift love story")

tools.name: science.materials.search
tools.description: Search 150,000+ inorganic materials by chemical formula, elements, band gap, stability, or metallic character. Returns DFT-computed properties: band gap, formation energy, density, crystal system. Filter semiconductors (band_gap 1-3 eV), stable battery cathodes (elements Li,Fe,O + is_stable), or metals. DOE/Lawrence Berkeley Lab data, CC BY 4.0 (Materials Project)

formula.description: Chemical formula to search (e.g. "Si", "Fe2O3", "LiFePO4"). Exact or reduced formula

elements.description: Comma-separated elements to filter (e.g. "Li,Fe,O" — returns materials containing these elements)

band_gap_min.description: Minimum band gap in eV (e.g. 1.0). Use with band_gap_max for range filter

band_gap_max.description: Maximum band gap in eV (e.g. 3.0). Use with band_gap_min for range filter

is_stable.description: Filter for thermodynamically stable materials only (energy_above_hull = 0)

tools.name: science.materials.details
tools.description: Get full DFT-computed properties for a material by Materials Project ID (e.g. mp-149 for silicon). Returns: band gap, formation energy, thermodynamic stability, density, crystal structure, spacegroup, magnetism, bulk/shear modulus, Poisson ratio, Fermi energy, database cross-references. 150K+ materials (Materials Project)

material_id.description: Materials Project ID (e.g. "mp-149" for silicon, "mp-19017" for LiFePO4). Get IDs from materials.search

tools.name: science.materials.elasticity
tools.description: Get mechanical/elastic properties for a material: bulk modulus, shear modulus (Voigt-Reuss-Hill averages), universal anisotropy index, Poisson ratio, and full 6x6 elastic tensor (IEEE format). Essential for structural materials screening and mechanical simulations (Materials Project)

material_id.description: Materials Project ID (e.g. "mp-149"). Returns bulk/shear modulus, Poisson ratio, elastic tensor

tools.name: logistics.tracking.register
tools.description: Register a tracking number to begin monitoring shipment status. Auto-detects carrier from 3,200+ supported carriers worldwide (UPS, FedEx, DHL, USPS, China Post, Royal Mail, etc.). Must be called before tracking.status. Returns detected carrier and registration status. Consumes quota — 200 free/month (17TRACK)

tracking_number.description: Package tracking number (e.g. "1Z999AA10123456784" for UPS, "9400111899560243888780" for USPS). Carrier is auto-detected from 3,200+ supported carriers

tag.description: Optional label for this shipment (e.g. order ID, customer reference). Up to 50 characters

tools.name: logistics.tracking.status
tools.description: Get full tracking timeline for a registered package — latest status, all carrier scan events with timestamps and locations, delivery milestones, transit days, origin/destination countries. Supports 3,200+ carriers across 220 countries. Call tracking.register first if number is not yet registered (17TRACK)

tracking_number.description: Tracking number previously registered with tracking.register. Returns full event timeline, carrier info, milestones, and delivery status

tools.name: logistics.tracking.list
tools.description: List all tracking numbers registered in your account with status summary — package status, latest event, transit days, registration time. Paginated. Filter by status: NotFound, InTransit, Delivered, Expired, Exception (17TRACK)

tools.name: account.analytics.usage
tools.description: Get your API usage summary — total calls, total cost, cache hit rate, average latency, and unique tools used. Filter by period: 1 day, 7 days, or 30 days. See how efficiently you are using the platform. Free, no charge (APIbase)

period.description: Time period for usage stats: "1d" (24 hours), "7d" (7 days), or "30d" (30 days). Default: "7d"

tools.name: account.analytics.tools
tools.description: Get per-tool usage breakdown — calls, cost, cache hits, average latency, last used. Sort by cost (highest spend), calls (most used), or latency (slowest). Identify your most-used and most-expensive tools. Free, no charge (APIbase)

sort.description: Sort tools by: "cost" (highest spend), "calls" (most used), or "latency" (slowest). Default: "calls"

limit.description: Max number of tools to return (1-100). Default: 20

tools.name: account.analytics.timeseries
tools.description: Get time-series usage data — calls, cost, cache hits per hour or day over a period. Visualize usage patterns and trends. Choose granularity: hourly (for 1d period) or daily (for 7d/30d). Free, no charge (APIbase)

tools.name: platform.quality.tool
tools.description: Get quality metrics for any tool — uptime percentage, p50/p95 latency, error rate, total calls in last 24h. Check reliability before calling expensive tools. Updated every 10 minutes. Free, no charge (APIbase)

tool_id.description: Tool ID to get quality metrics for (e.g. "crypto.get_price", "weather.get_current")

tools.name: platform.quality.rankings
tools.description: Get ranked list of tools by quality — sort by uptime (most reliable), latency (fastest), or error_rate (fewest errors). Filter by category (e.g. "crypto", "weather"). Discover the best tools for your use case. Free, no charge (APIbase)

sort.description: Sort by: "uptime" (highest availability), "latency" (fastest p50), or "error_rate" (lowest errors). Default: "uptime"

limit.description: Max number of tools to return (1-100). Default: 20

tools.name: platform.batch.call
tools.description: Execute up to 20 tool calls in a single request with parallel execution (max 10 concurrent). Each call runs the full pipeline independently with its own billing. Returns array of results with per-call status, data, cost, and duration. Save 5x round-trips vs sequential calls. Batch wrapper is free — you pay only for individual tool calls (APIbase)

idempotency_key.description: Optional idempotency key for this specific call

calls.description: Array of tool calls to execute in parallel (max 20)

tools.name: jobs.theirstack.search
tools.description: Search 181M+ job postings worldwide — filter by keywords, country, remote, tech stack, recency. Returns title, company, location, salary range, post date. Job market intelligence for hiring analysis and talent sourcing (TheirStack)

keywords.description: Comma-separated job title keywords (e.g. "python developer, backend engineer"). Matches job_title_or filter

days.description: Max age in days (1-90). Only jobs posted within this window

technologies.description: Comma-separated tech stack filter (e.g. "kubernetes, python, react"). Matches technologies_or

tools.name: jobs.theirstack.companies
tools.description: Find companies by technology stack — filter by technologies (kubernetes, react, python...), country, minimum active jobs. Returns company name, URL, job count, tech stack. Identify employers using specific technologies (TheirStack)

technologies.description: Comma-separated tech stack filter (e.g. "kubernetes, docker, aws"). Find companies using these technologies

min_jobs.description: Minimum number of active job postings

tools.name: jobs.jooble.search
tools.description: Search aggregated job listings across 70+ countries — filter by keywords, location, radius, salary, company name. Returns title, company, location, salary, source, direct link. 9M+ active listings from thousands of job boards (Jooble)

radius.description: Search radius in km from location: 0, 4, 8, 16, 26, 40, or 80

company_search.description: Set true to search by company name instead of job title

tools.name: jobs.arbeitnow.browse
tools.description: Browse European job listings — 100 jobs per page sorted by newest. Returns title, company, location, remote flag, tags, job types, direct link. Updated hourly. EU-focused: Germany, Austria, Switzerland, Netherlands, and more. Open public API (Arbeitnow)

page.description: Page number (default 1). Each page returns ~100 EU job listings sorted by newest first. No server-side search — use page to browse

tools.name: jobs.reed.search
tools.description: Search UK job listings — filter by keywords, location, distance, salary range (GBP), contract type (permanent/contract/temp), full/part time. Returns title, company, salary, applications count, direct link. UK largest job board (Reed.co.uk)

location.description: UK location — city, town, or postcode (e.g. "London", "Manchester", "SW1A 1AA")

distance.description: Search radius in miles from location (default 10)

skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination (must be divisible by limit)

tools.name: jobs.reed.details
tools.description: Get full details of a UK job listing by ID — title, company, full salary info (min/max GBP, annual/hourly/daily), contract type, full/part time, application count, full HTML description, external apply URL. Use job IDs from reed.search results (Reed.co.uk)

job_id.description: Reed job ID (from search results). Example: 56448344

tools.name: jobs.remotive.search
tools.description: Search curated remote-only job listings — filter by keywords and category (software-dev, design, marketing, data, devops, etc.). Returns title, company, salary, job type, location requirements, tags. Global remote positions only (Remotive)

category.description: Job category slug: software-dev, design, customer-support, writing, marketing, sales, product, business, data, devops, finance, hr, qa, all-others

tools.name: ecommerce.amazon.search
tools.description: Search Amazon products by keyword — filter by price range, sort by relevance/price/rating/reviews/newest. Returns title, ASIN, price, rating, Prime flag, image. 12 marketplaces: US, UK, CA, DE, FR, IT, ES, AU, IN, MX, BR, JP (Canopy API)

query.description: Search keywords (e.g. "wireless headphones", "raspberry pi 5")

domain.description: Amazon marketplace: US, UK, CA, DE, FR, IT, ES, AU, IN, MX, BR, JP (default US)

sort.description: Sort order: relevance, price_asc, price_desc, rating, reviews, newest

tools.name: ecommerce.amazon.product
tools.description: Get full Amazon product details by ASIN — title, brand, price, rating, stock status, feature bullets, categories, seller name. Use ASINs from canopy.search. 12 Amazon marketplaces supported (Canopy API)

asin.description: Amazon ASIN product ID (e.g. "B0CRSNCJ6Y"). Get ASINs from canopy.search

domain.description: Amazon marketplace: US, UK, CA, DE, FR, IT, ES, AU, IN, MX, BR, JP (default US)

tools.name: ecommerce.amazon.offers
tools.description: Get all third-party seller offers for an Amazon product — price, condition (new/used), seller name & rating, Buy Box winner flag, Fulfilled by Amazon, delivery estimate. Price comparison across sellers (Canopy API)

asin.description: Amazon ASIN product ID. Returns all third-party offers with Buy Box winner, seller ratings, delivery info

tools.name: finance.edgar.xbrl_frames
tools.title: SEC Cross-Company Financial Comparison
tools.description: Compare a financial metric across ALL SEC-reporting companies for a period. Query Revenues for CY2023 → 2,649 companies with values. Top: Walmart $648B, UnitedHealth $371B. Free alternative to Bloomberg/FactSet. Period format: CY2023 (annual), CY2023Q4I (quarterly).

tag.description: XBRL concept tag (e.g. Revenues, NetIncomeLoss, Assets, TotalDebt)

period.description: Reporting period: CY2023 (annual), CY2023Q4I (quarterly instant), CY2023Q3 (quarterly duration)

unit.description: Unit of measure (default: USD). Other: USD/shares for EPS, shares for share counts

tools.name: usno.astronomy.moon_phases
tools.title: Moon Phases
tools.description: Get all moon phase dates for a year — New Moon, First Quarter, Full Moon, Last Quarter with exact UTC timestamps. ~50 phases per year. Source: US Naval Observatory (canonical astronomical authority, US Gov public domain).

year.description: Year for moon phases (default: current year, e.g. 2026)

tools.name: usno.astronomy.seasons
tools.title: Equinoxes & Solstices
tools.description: Get exact dates and UTC times for vernal equinox, summer solstice, autumnal equinox, and winter solstice for any year. Also includes Earth perihelion and aphelion dates. Source: US Naval Observatory.

year.description: Year for equinoxes and solstices (default: current year)

tools.name: usno.astronomy.sun_moon
tools.title: Sun & Moon Rise/Set Times
tools.description: Get sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset, and transit times for any location and date. Includes civil/nautical/astronomical twilight. Used for photography golden hour, agriculture planning, outdoor events. Source: USNO.

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (e.g. 40.7128 for New York)

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (e.g. -74.0060 for New York)

tools.name: wger.fitness.exercise_details
tools.title: Exercise Details
tools.description: Get full exercise details by ID — description, primary and secondary muscles worked, required equipment (barbell/dumbbell/bodyweight/machine), and category. Use with exercise_search to build workout plans.

id.description: Exercise base ID from search results (e.g. 615 for Squats)

tools.name: wger.fitness.exercise_search
tools.title: Exercise Search
tools.description: Search 896 exercises by name — bench press, squat, deadlift, curl, etc. Returns exercise name, category (Chest/Back/Legs/Arms/Abs/Shoulders/Cardio), and ID for details lookup. Open-source fitness database (Wger, CC-BY-SA).

term.description: Exercise name to search (e.g. "bench press", "squat", "deadlift", "bicep curl")

tools.name: wger.fitness.ingredients
tools.title: Food Ingredient Nutrition
tools.description: Search 1.28M food ingredients by name — chicken breast, rice, banana, oats. Returns calories (kcal), protein, carbs, fat, fiber, sugar, sodium per 100g. Complements USDA FDC with broader international coverage.

tools.name: email.verification.check
tools.title: Verify Email Address
tools.description: Verify an email address — SMTP deliverability check, DNS/MX validation, disposable email detection, catch-all server detection, free provider flag, role account flag (info@, admin@). Returns comprehensive verification result. Powered by WhoisXML API.

email.description: Email address to verify (e.g. user@example.com, test@gmail.com)

tools.name: solar.system.bodies
tools.title: Solar System Bodies
tools.description: List solar system bodies — planets, moons, asteroids, comets, dwarf planets. Returns name, body type, gravity, radius, and moon count. 1,400+ bodies. Filter by type. Source: Solar System OpenData (MIT license).

body_type.description: Filter by body type: planet, moon, asteroid, comet, dwarf_planet, or all (default: all)

tools.name: solar.system.body_details
tools.title: Solar System Body Details
tools.description: Get comprehensive data for a solar system body — mass, radius, density, gravity, escape velocity, temperature, axial tilt, orbital period, semi-major axis, eccentricity, inclination, discoverer, and list of moons. Source: Solar System OpenData.

id.description: Body ID from search results (e.g. "mars", "jupiter", "moon", "europa", "ceres")

tools.name: iss.space.position
tools.title: ISS Current Position
tools.description: Get the real-time position of the International Space Station — latitude, longitude, altitude (km), velocity (km/h), and daylight/eclipse visibility. ISS orbits at 28,000 km/h, completes one orbit every 90 minutes. Updates every ~60 seconds.

tools.name: iss.space.tle
tools.title: ISS Orbital Elements (TLE)
tools.description: Get the Two-Line Element set (TLE) for the International Space Station — NORAD catalog #25544. Contains orbital parameters for trajectory prediction and satellite tracking calculations.

format.description: Response format: json (default) or text (raw TLE two-line element)

tools.name: hf.hub.datasets
tools.title: Search ML Datasets
tools.description: Search 200K+ datasets on HuggingFace Hub by name or keyword. Returns dataset ID, downloads, likes, tags. Covers NLP, vision, audio, tabular datasets. Sorted by downloads.

search.description: Search query — dataset name or keyword (e.g. "wikipedia", "imagenet", "squad")

tools.name: hf.hub.model_details
tools.title: ML Model Details
tools.description: Get full metadata for a HuggingFace model — downloads, likes, tags, library, author, pipeline task, model card data. Use model_id from hf.models search (e.g. "meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct").

tools.name: hf.hub.models
tools.title: Search ML Models
tools.description: Search 1M+ ML models on HuggingFace Hub by name, task (text-generation, image-classification, translation), or library (transformers, diffusers). Returns model ID, downloads, likes, pipeline tag. Sorted by downloads.

search.description: Search query — model name or keyword (e.g. "llama", "stable-diffusion", "whisper")

task.description: Filter by ML task: text-generation, image-classification, translation, text-to-image, automatic-speech-recognition, etc.

library.description: Filter by framework: transformers, diffusers, sentence-transformers, gguf, etc.

tools.name: water.usgs.realtime
tools.title: Real-Time Water Data
tools.description: Get real-time streamflow (ft^3/s), gage height (ft), water temperature, and conductance for a USGS monitoring site. Updated every 15 minutes. Covers rivers, streams, lakes, reservoirs across the US. Use water.sites to find site numbers (USGS)

site_no.description: USGS site number (e.g. "09380000"). Use water.sites to find site numbers first.

parameter_cd.description: Parameter code(s), comma-separated. Common: 00060=streamflow, 00065=gage height, 00010=temperature. Default: all available.

period.description: ISO 8601 duration for data window (e.g. "PT2H" for 2 hours, "P7D" for 7 days). Default: PT2H.

tools.name: water.usgs.sites
tools.title: Search Water Monitoring Sites
tools.description: Search 1.5M+ USGS water monitoring sites by US state, county FIPS, bounding box, or site number. Returns site ID, station name, coordinates, altitude, HUC watershed code. Use site numbers with water.realtime for live data (USGS)

county.description: County FIPS code, 5 digits (e.g. "06037" for Los Angeles County)

bbox.description: Bounding box: west,south,east,north in decimal degrees (e.g. "-105.5,39.5,-104.5,40.5")

site_no.description: USGS site number (e.g. "09380000" for Colorado River at Lees Ferry)

tools.name: worldbank.dev.indicators
tools.title: Search Development Indicators
tools.description: Search 16,000+ World Bank development indicators by keyword or topic — GDP, population, poverty, education, health, environment, trade. Returns indicator ID, name, source, description, topics. Use indicator IDs with finance.country_data for time-series data (World Bank, CC BY 4.0)

tools.name: cdc.health.datasets
tools.title: Search CDC Health Datasets
tools.description: Search 1,400+ CDC public health datasets — COVID-19, chronic disease, vaccination, mortality, birth/death statistics, environmental health. Returns dataset ID, name, description, category. Use dataset IDs with cdc.query to fetch data (US Gov)

query.description: Search keyword (e.g. "covid deaths", "vaccination rates", "chronic disease", "mortality")

tools.name: cdc.health.query
tools.title: Query CDC Dataset
tools.description: Query a specific CDC dataset using SoQL filters — filter by state, year, age group, condition. Returns structured rows with column names. Supports WHERE, SELECT, ORDER, GROUP BY. Use cdc.datasets to find dataset IDs first (US Gov, Socrata SODA API)

dataset_id.description: CDC dataset ID in xxxx-xxxx format (e.g. "9bhg-hcku" for COVID deaths). Use cdc.datasets to find IDs.

select.description: Columns to return, comma-separated (e.g. "state, year, deaths"). Default: all columns.

order.description: Sort order (e.g. "year DESC", "deaths DESC"). Default: dataset default order.

group.description: Group by columns for aggregation (e.g. "state" with select "state, SUM(deaths)")

tools.name: dblp.cs.author
tools.title: Search CS Authors
tools.description: Search 3M+ computer science authors on DBLP. Returns author name, DBLP PID, profile URL, aliases, affiliations. Use for finding researchers, checking publication records, or discovering collaborators (DBLP, CC0)

query.description: Author name to search (e.g. "Geoffrey Hinton", "Yann LeCun", "Ilya Sutskever")

tools.name: dblp.cs.search
tools.title: Search CS Papers
tools.description: Search 7M+ computer science publications on DBLP by title, keyword, or topic. Returns title, authors, venue (NeurIPS, ICML, CVPR, ACL, etc.), year, DOI. The largest CS-specific bibliography — covers journals, conferences, and workshops (DBLP, CC0)

query.description: Search query — paper title, keyword, or topic (e.g. "transformer attention", "graph neural network", "LLM reasoning")

tools.name: tides.noaa.predictions
tools.title: Tide Predictions
tools.description: Get tide predictions for a NOAA station — high/low tides, hourly, or 6-minute intervals. Returns predicted water level in feet or meters. Covers US coastlines, rivers, Great Lakes. Station IDs: 8518750 (NYC), 9414290 (SF), 8443970 (Boston) (NOAA, US Gov)

station.description: NOAA station ID (e.g. "8518750" for The Battery NYC, "9414290" for San Francisco, "8443970" for Boston)

end_date.description: End date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g. "20260410"). Max range: 31 days.

interval.description: Prediction interval: "hilo" = high/low tides only (default), "h" = hourly, "6" = every 6 minutes

datum.description: Vertical datum: MLLW (default), MSL, NAVD, MHHW, MHW, MLW, etc.

tools.name: tides.noaa.water_levels
tools.title: Real-Time Water Levels
tools.description: Get real-time observed water levels from a NOAA station — latest reading or recent history. Returns water level in feet or meters with quality flags. Updated every 6 minutes. Covers US coastlines, rivers, Great Lakes (NOAA, US Gov)

station.description: NOAA station ID (e.g. "8518750" for The Battery NYC, "9414290" for San Francisco)

date.description: Date filter: "latest" (default, most recent reading), "today", "recent" (last 72 hours), or YYYYMMDD for specific date

datum.description: Vertical datum: MLLW (default), MSL, NAVD, MHHW, MHW, MLW, etc.

tools.name: met.art.details
tools.title: Artwork Details
tools.description: Get full details for a Met Museum artwork by object ID — title, artist, date, medium, dimensions, department, culture, provenance, high-res image URLs, public domain status. Use met.search to find object IDs first (Met Museum, CC0)

object_id.description: Met Museum object ID (e.g. 436524 for Van Gogh Sunflowers, 45734 for Washington Crossing the Delaware). Use met.search to find IDs.

tools.name: met.art.search
tools.title: Search Met Museum Artworks
tools.description: Search 470,000+ artworks at The Metropolitan Museum of Art by keyword, artist, medium, department, date range, or geography. Returns object IDs — use met.details for full metadata and images. CC0 public domain (Met Museum)

query.description: Search keyword — artist, title, medium, or subject (e.g. "monet", "sunflowers", "greek vase", "armor")

department_id.description: Department filter: 1=American Decorative Arts, 3=Ancient Near Eastern Art, 6=Asian Art, 9=Drawings and Prints, 11=European Paintings, 13=Greek and Roman Art, 17=Medieval Art, 21=Modern Art

has_images.description: Only return artworks with images (default: true)

date_begin.description: Start year for date range filter (e.g. 1800). Use with date_end.

date_end.description: End year for date range filter (e.g. 1900). Use with date_begin.

tools.name: rijks.art.details
tools.title: Rijksmuseum Artwork Details
tools.description: Get full details for a Rijksmuseum artwork by object ID — title (multiple languages), object number, creation date, production location, materials, dimensions, current gallery location. Linked Art JSON-LD format (CIDOC CRM). Use rijks.search to find object IDs first (Rijksmuseum, CC-BY)

object_id.description: Rijksmuseum numeric ID (e.g. "200107928" for The Night Watch). Use rijks.search to find IDs.

tools.name: rijks.art.search
tools.title: Search Rijksmuseum Collection
tools.description: Search 800,000+ artworks at the Rijksmuseum (Dutch national museum) by title, description, creation date, or object number. Returns Linked Open Data object IDs — use rijks.details for full metadata. Covers Rembrandt, Vermeer, Van Gogh, and centuries of Dutch art. CC-BY license (Rijksmuseum)

creation_date.description: Filter by creation year or date (e.g. "1642", "1665")

object_number.description: Rijksmuseum object number (e.g. "SK-C-5" for Night Watch)

tools.name: cma.art.details
tools.title: CMA Artwork Details
tools.description: Get full details for a Cleveland Museum artwork by ID — title, artist, nationality, date, medium, dimensions, culture, provenance, license status (CC0/restricted), image URLs (web + full resolution). Use cma.search to find artwork IDs first (CMA, CC0)

artwork_id.description: Cleveland Museum artwork ID (e.g. 135382 for Monet "The Red Kerchief"). Use cma.search to find IDs.

tools.name: cma.art.search
tools.title: Search Cleveland Museum Collection
tools.description: Search 64,000+ artworks at the Cleveland Museum of Art by keyword, artist, type, or department. Filter for CC0-only (commercial-free) images. Returns artwork IDs, title, artist, date, license status, image URLs. Use cma.artwork for full details (CMA, CC0)

query.description: Search keyword — artist, title, subject (e.g. "monet", "armor", "japanese")

type.description: Artwork type filter (e.g. "Painting", "Sculpture", "Print", "Photograph")

department.description: Department filter (e.g. "European Painting and Sculpture", "Asian Art", "Prints")

cc0_only.description: Only return CC0-licensed artworks (free for commercial use). Default: false.

has_image.description: Only return artworks with images (default: true)

tools.name: smithsonian.collection.record
tools.title: Smithsonian Record Details
tools.description: Get full record for a Smithsonian Open Access item by ID — title, unit code (which of 19 museums), license (CC0 flag), record_link (canonical URL), data_source, online media (images/audio/video), freetext metadata, indexed structured fields. Use smithsonian.search to find IDs first (Smithsonian, CC0 subset)

id.description: Smithsonian record ID from a previous search result (e.g. "edanmdm-nmnhvz_5068559" or "ld1-*"). Use smithsonian.search first to find IDs.

tools.name: smithsonian.collection.search
tools.title: Search Smithsonian Collections
tools.description: Full-text search across 11M+ records from 19 Smithsonian museums — art, artifacts, scientific specimens, archives. Filter by type (objects/species/archives/books/online_media/events/places), sort by relevancy/newest/updated/random, and CC0-only by default. Covers National Museum of Natural History, Air and Space, American Art, Portrait Gallery, Freer|Sackler, and more (Smithsonian Open Access, CC0 subset)

q.description: Full-text search query. Example: "dinosaur", "picasso", "apollo 11". Supports EDAN query syntax (field:value, AND/OR).

rows.description: Number of results to return (1-100, default 10).

start.description: Offset for pagination (default 0). Useful with rowCount from previous call.

sort.description: Sort order for results. Default: relevancy.

type.description: Filter by record type. E.g. "objects" for 3D objects, "species" for scientific specimens.

online_media_type.description: Filter to items that have media of a specific type.

cc0_only.description: Filter results to CC0-licensed records only (default true). Set false to include all records with their license field.

tools.name: soil.survey.properties
tools.title: Soil Properties by Location
tools.description: Get USDA SSURGO soil properties for a US location by lat/lon (WGS84). Returns dominant component(s) with depth-stratified horizons including drainage class, taxonomic class, pH, organic matter %, and sand/silt/clay percentages per horizon. Coverage: US continental + Alaska + Hawaii + territories; international/water/unsurveyed points return empty components array. Authoritative source: NRCS Soil Data Access (no auth, unlimited free, US Gov open data)

lat.description: Latitude in WGS84 decimal degrees (e.g. 42.0 for central Iowa farmland, 38.89 for Washington DC). Coverage: US continental + Alaska + Hawaii + territories.

lon.description: Longitude in WGS84 decimal degrees (e.g. -93.5 for central Iowa, -77.03 for Washington DC). Note: longitude FIRST in coordinate pairs only matters for SQL — this field is independent.

tools.name: phone.telnyx.balance
tools.title: Account Balance (Telnyx)
tools.description: Read current Telnyx account balance, available credit, currency, pending charges, and credit limit. Useful for cost monitoring before placing high-volume sends (Telnyx)

refresh.description: Set to true to bypass the 30-second cache and fetch a fresh balance from Telnyx. Default false.

tools.name: phone.telnyx.list
tools.title: List Messages (Telnyx)
tools.description: List recent Telnyx messages with optional filters: direction (inbound/outbound), date_from (ISO 8601), and pagination limit (max 100). Returns array of {message_id, from, to, text, status, created_at, cost} (Telnyx)

limit.description: Max number of messages to return per page (default 25, max 100).

direction.description: Filter by message direction: "outbound" (sent by us) or "inbound" (received).

date_from.description: ISO 8601 date — return messages created on or after this date (e.g. "2026-04-26").

tools.name: phone.telnyx.status
tools.title: Message Status (Telnyx)
tools.description: Get delivery status and events for a previously sent Telnyx message by message UUID. Returns per-recipient status (queued/sending/sent/delivered/failed), parts, sent_at, completed_at, errors, and cost (Telnyx)

message_id.description: Telnyx message UUID returned by send_sms (e.g. "40ab7e80-94c6-4cb6-8c45-c3ed3e3bf3ec").

tools.name: phone.telnyx.sms
tools.title: Send SMS (Telnyx)
tools.description: ⚡ ACTION: Send SMS message worldwide via Telnyx carrier-grade network. Requires a Telnyx number as sender (E.164). Lowest published US SMS rate ($0.004 + carrier fees). Returns message_id, status per recipient, segment count, and cost (Telnyx)

to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g. "+14155551234"). Trial accounts can only send to verified destination numbers added in the Telnyx portal.

from.description: Sender phone number in E.164 format — must be a Telnyx number you own (e.g. "+15551234567"). Provision via Telnyx portal Numbers > Buy Numbers.

text.description: SMS body text (max 1600 chars; >160 splits into multiple billing segments).

messaging_profile_id.description: Optional Telnyx messaging profile UUID to route through a specific profile (10DLC campaign, sender pool).

prompts.name: discover-tools
prompts.description: Find the right APIbase tools for a task. Describes available categories, search strategies, and tool selection criteria.

arguments.name: task
arguments.description: What you want to accomplish (e.g. "find flights from NYC to London")

prompts.name: api-workflow
prompts.description: Design a multi-step API workflow combining multiple APIbase tools. Returns execution plan with tool sequence, data flow, and error handling.

arguments.name: goal
arguments.description: End-to-end goal (e.g. "plan a trip to Tokyo with flights, weather, and local events")

arguments.name: budget
arguments.description: Optional USDC budget constraint for the workflow

prompts.name: x402-payment-guide
prompts.description: Explains x402 USDC micropayment flow for APIbase. Covers wallet setup on Base, payment headers, escrow mechanics, and refund policy.

resources.name: tool-catalog
resources.description: Full tool catalog with schemas, pricing, and provider info
